queries.question: Which species are the same for all agroforestry systems?
queries.sql: SELECT Species.name  from System_Species join Species on System_Species.species_id = Species.id join Agroforestry_Systems on System_Species.agroforestry_system_id = Agroforestry_Systems.id   GROUP BY System_Species.species_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT System_Species.agroforestry_system_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Agroforestry_Systems)

queries.question: For every agroforestry system, show the species that they contain.
queries.sql: select agroforestry_systems.system_name , species.name from System_Species join Species on System_Species.species_id = Species.id join Agroforestry_Systems on System_Species.agroforestry_system_id = Agroforestry_Systems.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?system_name ?name WHERE {
  ?system_species a :System_Species .
  ?species a :Species .
  ?system_species p:hasSpecies ?species .
  ?agroforestry_systems a :Agroforestry_Systems .
  ?system_species p:hasAgroforestry_Systems ?agroforestry_systems .
  ?agroforestry_systems p:name ?system_name .
  ?species p:name ?name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the species that each agroforestry system contains.
